response.overview: Forrest Parker is a high school DIY dark comedy from 2007. It follows a young man named Forrest Parker, a competitive street dancer who strives to be the best. His father hates him and believes nothing good could come from dancing. With the help from his friend Timmy Smalls, the two come together to achieve greatness in the underground dance community. They must defeat rival El Penito, a Mexican dancer who is also climbing the ranks.
response.title: Forrest Parker
